ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, end-user) */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user in kilograms */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user using the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., smartwatch, fitness tracker) */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "battery_level" INTEGER /* Battery level of the device */,
  "last_seen" TEXT /* Date and time the device was last seen */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Version of the device firmware */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the device was first registered */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the device record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device generating the data */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time the data was recorded */,
  "skin_temp" REAL /* Skin temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "air_temp" REAL /* Air temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "heartrate" INTEGER /* Heart rate in beats per minute */,
  "steps" INTEGER /* Number of steps taken */,
  "gsr" REAL /* Galvanic skin response (GSR) in Siemens */,
  "calories" REAL /* Calories burned */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the data was recorded */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity during which the data was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the data was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the data record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., walking, running, sleeping) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activity */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in minutes */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the activity took place */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance covered during the activity in meters */,
  "calories_burned" REAL /* Calories burned during the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the activity was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the activity record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sleep_data" (
  "sleep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sleep session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "sleep_type" TEXT /* Type of sleep (e.g., light, deep, REM) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the sleep session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the sleep session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the sleep session in minutes */,
  "toss_turn" INTEGER /* Number of times the user tossed and turned */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the sleep session took place */,
  "quality" TEXT /* Quality of the sleep session (e.g., good, fair, poor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sleep data was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sleep data record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sleep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sleep_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_sync" (
  "sync_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each synchronization event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being synchronized */,
  "sync_time" TEXT /* Date and time the device was synchronized */,
  "sync_status" TEXT /* Status of the synchronization (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "sync_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the synchronization process in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the synchronization event was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the synchronization record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sync_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_sync_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device setting */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the setting was first set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_settings_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., heart rate, sleep patterns) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analysis result was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analysis result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "recommendation_type" TEXT /* Type of recommendation (e.g., exercise, diet) */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Personalized recommendation for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the recommendation was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the recommendation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "goal_type" TEXT /* Type of goal (e.g., exercise, diet) */,
  "target_value" INTEGER /* Target value for the goal */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the goal */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the goal */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the goal was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the goal was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_goals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goal_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress update */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the goal */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date of the progress update */,
  "progress_value" INTEGER /* Value of the progress update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the progress was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the progress record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goal_progress_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_id") REFERENCES user_goals ("goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heart_rate_zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heart rate zone */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the heart rate zone */,
  "min_heart_rate" INTEGER /* Minimum heart rate for the zone */,
  "max_heart_rate" INTEGER /* Maximum heart rate for the zone */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the heart rate zone was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the heart rate zone was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heart_rate_zones_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sleep_stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sleep stage */,
  "sleep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sleep session */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the sleep stage */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the sleep stage */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the sleep stage */,
  "quality" TEXT /* Quality of the sleep stage (e.g., good, fair, poor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sleep stage was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sleep stage record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sleep_stages_sleep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sleep_id") REFERENCES sleep_data ("sleep_id")
)
